claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.

depth_profile.claim_boundary: PhysicsGuard owns the family baseline semantics and every target-local current-model purpose, failure, native oracle, proof, residual risk, and bounded claim. SkillGuard only executes and reconciles the declared family baseline inventory; that receipt cannot close a current model.

functions.business_intent: Prove the maintained family baseline checker capability only: Prevent an engineering audit from being declared complete while required native checks, current evidence, blockers, predictive conditions, or the bounded claim scope remain unresolved.

action.summary: Validate the immutable PhysicsGuard family baseline contract; this is not current-model purpose authority.
Admit only the family baseline candidate bound to its exact baseline contract and ordered authoring chain.
Execute the mandatory family baseline known-good proof.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Candidate is not proven against required native check is missing.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Candidate is not proven against stale or skipped evidence is promoted.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Candidate is not proven against unresolved blocker is suppressed.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Candidate is not proven against predictive readiness is overclaimed.
Prove the maintained family baseline blocks its declared regression case: Candidate is not proven against closure scope is overreached.
